data.name: Brainwashing Academy - The Cursed Person's Pot
data.detailed_description:
"Brainwashing Academy - The Cursed Person's Pot" is an RPG game produced by U-ROOM and published by Hanabi games.

One day, you awaken with no memories, guided only by a mysterious girl your age named Masamitsu Kanae. It turns out you've struck a deal with her uncle, granting you a powerful curse of brainwashing. Now, you're tasked with infiltrating your old school as a shadowy strategist, using this forbidden power to break the established order... and there's so much more waiting to be uncovered.

Will you unleash the curse fully, corrupting the entire academy into a den of unchecked desires?

Or will you probe its hidden mysteries, seeking the truth behind the curse?

  • Dual Branching Routes:

Your choices determine the path—

Embrace the Collapse Route for violent and total academy destruction,

or pursue the Truth Route for a gentler corruption while unraveling secrets with your ally, Kanae.

  • Strategic Gameplay:

Act as a mastermind, rarely participating directly in scenes. Command brainwashed students in high-speed battles, conquer dungeons to unlock location-specific commands.

  • Jrpg

  • Puzzle-solving

  • Captivating story

  • Multiple Endings and Story Branches

  • Character Development

  • Skill Variety

  • Turn-Based Combat

data.short_description: One day, you awaken with no memories, guided only by a mysterious girl your age named Masamitsu Kanae. It turns out you've struck a deal with her uncle, granting you a powerful curse of brainwashing.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
